script_text: Great readers and writers pick the just-right word.
The right word makes a sentence clear!
When you read a sentence with a blank, think about what fits.
The kids were hungry. They ate a ___.
A snack? Yes! A song? No!
Every day, you learn new words from books and talks.
Try using them! The more you use a word, the better you know it.
Big words make your ideas shine!
Ask, does this word fit the meaning of my sentence?
Now you are ready to use big words!
